The '''OmniNode communications set''' was a communication device. The unit's signal power was often used as a base level for [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] emergency homing beacons.

==Characteristics==
Produced by the [[Bothawui Communications Conglomerate/Legends|BCC]] corporation, the OmniNode communications set was a larger, more powerful version of the simple BCC [[MultiNode communications link]]. The set was capable of transmitting to orbiting starships even during harsh weather and could manage twenty different signals at one time.<ref name="Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook" /> It was roughly the size of a small backpack and was able to boost its signal and processing power by wiring into a vehicle.<ref name="Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook" />
